action_set_definitions.name: get_cluster_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves cluster-wide constraints and capacity limits, specifically the maximum number of pods allowed on the current infrastructure.

action_set_definitions.name: get_deployment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time metrics for a specific deployment, including replica counts, resource utilization, and traffic performance.

service_name.description: The name of the service to query (e.g., 'checkout-service').

action_set_definitions.name: patch_deployment_replicas
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the desired number of replicas for a specific deployment.

service_name.description: The name of the service to scale.

action_set_definitions.name: patch_deployment_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the CPU and Memory resource requests/limits for the deployment pods to resolve scheduling blocks or resource contention.

service_name.description: The name of the service to update.

state_description.current_replicas: The number of pods currently in the 'Running' and 'Ready' state.
state_description.cpu_usage_percent: The average CPU utilization percentage across all ready pods.
state_description.memory_usage_percent: The average memory utilization percentage across all ready pods.
state_description.incoming_qps: The current rate of incoming requests per second directed to the deployment.
state_description.avg_latency_ms: The current average response latency in milliseconds.
state_description.max_node_capacity_pods: The maximum number of pods the underlying cluster nodes can support.
state_description.pending_replicas: The number of pods currently in 'Pending' state (transitioning to Ready).
